cleavage agent: digested with Sequence Grade Modified Trypsin
collision energy: using 35% of the normalized collision energy
fragmentation method: fragmentation of the ten most abundant peaks, using 35% of the normalized collision energy for obtaining MS/MS spectra.
instrument: using a Thermo Fisher LTQ Velos Pro mass spectrometer
ionization type: using a Proxeon nanoelectrospray ion source.
